3 rounds, 95%! Best session. Only miss: looks after vs takes after. Drill list verbs (think back, set up, keep up with) all nailed.
4 rounds, basics pivot. Perfect R1 (7/7). Learned: blow up, drop off, turn in, brought up. New drills: stand up, fill up, plug in, get dressed.
R1 5/7, R2 5/5 (100%). Midnight session, basics solid.
3 rounds. Learned blow out, put out, dress up. 2:26 AM session.

2 rounds. R1 6/7 (missed tear down), R2 7/7 PERFECT. Streak: 11.

4 rounds: R1 6/7 (tear down), R2 7/7 PERFECT, R3 6/7 (fill in vs turn in), R4 7/7 PERFECT. Megan present. New: look forward to. Tear down + turn in locked.

3 rounds: R1 7/7 PERFECT (look into/put off/pull it off/get rid of/cut down on/carry on/broke down), R2 5/7 (missed weed out, used up/ate up), R3 4/8 (missed went down, put together, picked up, think over). New: weed out, used up, put together, picked up, think over.
Mini drill (Meta ads context). Correct: look into / put it off / carry on / figured out / put up with. Missed: resolve → sort out / iron out.
Round: ramp up / put off / cut out / looked over / shot up. Missed: performed better than expected → turned out better than expected.
R1 6/7 (tear down miss again), R2 7/7 PERFECT (hand out + sort out redeemed), R3 5/7 (speed up, get out of new). 3-day break comeback.
4 rounds Box 2 review. Fixed dashboard (server-only, no localStorage). Leitner sync pipeline fixed. 93→72 in Box 2, 12 earned Box 3, rest back to Box 0.
3 rounds, 62%. New rule: due reviews first, then Box 0 new verbs. Nuance pairs: blow out/put out, take off/blow up, win over/blow away, hold off/wait on.

8 due reviews + 4 new Box 0. Correct: keep on, take on, put up with, come up with, log in, point out, show up, speak up. Wrong: carry out (idk), take care of (work out), head out (go away), get back (come back).
R1: tucked away, moved in, took apart, cash in correct. Missed: stick with (persist), shot up (surge), put on hold (defer).
R2: get the hang of, take out correct. Missed: scrape by (manage barely), phase in (introduce gradually), build on (iterate), move up (promote), scale down (downsize).
2 rounds. R1 6/7 (missed put away), R2 5/7 (missed pick up, do well). New: cover up, buy into.
